title: The Flaming Frontier
writer: Edward Sedgwick, Raymond L. Schrock, Edward J. Montagne
actors: Hoot Gibson, Anne Cornwall, Dustin Farnum
plot: Bob Langdon, a young Pony Express rider, is given an appointment to West Point, but is forced to leave the academy as the result of political intrigue stirred up by enemies of his friend, General George A. Custer. Bob returns to t...
